description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 37 hrs 1 min of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 6 mins. His activity was spread across 6 projects, and his coding time was primarily in Other (41%), Java (36%), and Markdown (14%). There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded this week.
